refnamediv.refpurpose: Wald test for GMM with nonlinear restrictions

listitem.para: * rgmm = tlist result for unrestricted estimation
* R = (s x 1) vector of nonlinear restriction of the form R(p) = 0, example R = ['p1-1/p2';'p5-p3*p4'];
* np = 'noprint' if the user does not want to print the results

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Performs Wald test for GMM with nonlinear restrictions

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
